pageContext.name: Flying Western Corgi
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Manas SUM are excited to present the Flying Western Corgi Statue!  Standing at 11' tall this hand-painted resin statue features one of the world's most adorable creatures - a corgi! Not your ordinary dog, this courageous corgi is ready to fly and explore the world by air.  With only 200 pieces made, don't miss your chance to add this statue to your collection today!
